summary: Verified fixes for two bugs in TeacherHubPro: 1) Word Search games now render correctly in PlayGame.js (no more 'Tipo de juego no soportado' error), 2) Play Again functionality in GamesCreator.js correctly calls the regeneration API and generates new questions. All 9 backend tests PASSED, frontend Playwright tests confirmed both fixes working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both bugs verified fixed via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Extended trial for test user (user_1f6e83d0c290) and created subscription record
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs are fixed: 1) Word Search game type is now supported in PlayGame.js (lines 847-926), 2) Play Again in GamesCreator.js calls regeneration API (lines 832-922). Test games available: test_word_search_1771598782, test_true_false_1771598782, test_progress_game_1771598787.

bug_1_word_search_fix.description: Word Search games no longer show 'Tipo de juego no soportado' error

evidence.frontend_test: Playwright confirmed 144 grid cells displayed, words shown (FOTOSINTESIS, MAGNETISMO, EVAPORACION), 'Terminé' button present
evidence.regeneration_test: POST /api/games/test_word_search_1771598782/regenerate-questions returns regenerated: true with new words

bug_2_play_again_fix.description: Play Again in Teacher's Game Library now calls regeneration API

console_logs: [GamesCreator] Regeneration response: true New questions generated successfully
evidence.frontend_test: Playwright confirmed 'Jugar de Nuevo' button visible in results screen, clicking it triggers regeneration

verification_summary.bug_1_word_search: VERIFIED FIXED - Word Search games render correctly with grid, words, and interactive buttons
verification_summary.bug_2_play_again: VERIFIED FIXED - Play Again button calls regeneration API and receives new questions
